evals.prompt: What did I work on today? Give me a summary of my sessions.
evals.expected_output: A summary of today's sessions across all projects, showing timestamps, projects, and first prompts. Should use list-sessions or recent with today's date filter.

evals.prompt: Find all my conversations where I discussed 'plugin' or 'marketplace' — I want to review my thinking around plugin architecture decisions
evals.expected_output: Search results showing conversations mentioning 'plugin' and 'marketplace' with context snippets and session IDs. Should then drill into specific sessions to show the actual discussion.

evals.prompt: Show me my last few sessions in the x-cli project — I want to see what I was working on most recently there
evals.expected_output: List of recent sessions filtered to the x-cli project, then reading the most recent session to show the conversation. Should use --project flag with x-cli.
